angle.description: The angle of the annotation in degrees clockwise.

text.description: The text of a text-type annotation.

width.description: The width of a text- or circle-type annotation.

default.description: The default location on the axis.

hidden.description: Whether the axis is considered to be hidden from the font user.

name.description: The user-facing name of the axis.

names.description: The user-facing, localized name of the axis.

tag.description: The OpenType tag of the axis. Must be unique within the font. The tag may be longer than four characters in which case only the first four characters are considered to be the canonical tag of the axis and the rest is used as a differentiating identifier. On export, the canonical tag is used. Multiple axes with the same canonical tag are useful for higher-order interpolation.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the axis.

automatic.description: Whether the code of the class is generated automatically.

file.description: The file name of the file containing the code of the class. The file is located in `DocumentName.glyphspackage/features/FILENAME` where `FILENAME` is this value. The file contents are equivalent to the string defined by the `code` property.

name.description: The name of the class. The leading at sign (`@`) is not included.

notes.description: A string serving as a description or comment about the class.

oneOf.description: An RGB color with an alpha channel in the font color space. In version 4, color components are normalized to the range 0…1.
A gray color with an alpha channel. In version 4, color components are normalized to the range 0…1.
A CMYK color with an alpha channel. In version 4, color components are normalized to the range 0…1.

prefixItems.description: The color palette entry index. `65535` indicates the current text color.
The alpha factor applied to the referenced palette color.

oneOf.description: A color reference into the `Color Palettes` custom parameter.
The index of the color label. See also [the handbook entry on color labels](https://handbook.glyphsapp.com/glyph/#glyph/color-label).
Disabled: automatic positioning is disabled.
Default: automatic positioning follows the normal eligibility rules.
Forced: automatic positioning is enabled regardless of normal eligibility.
Horizontal: only the horizontal coordinate is positioned automatically.

alignment.description: Controls the automatic alignment of the component. `-1`: disabled (no alignment), `0`: default (alignment is based on context), `1`: force alignment (align regardless of context), `3`: horizontal alignment (align horizontally, but allow for manual vertical placement).

anchor.description: The name of the attachment anchor. Set to specify a specific anchor when there are multiple candidates.

angle.description: The rotation angle of the component in degrees clockwise.

masterId.description: The ID of the master from which the component is derived.

oneOf.description: Left: x values are relative to the left edge of the layer box.
Right: x values are relative to the right edge of the layer box.
Center: x values are relative to the center of the layer box.

piece.description: The Smart Component settings of the component, mapping property names to values.

pos.description: The position (translation transform) of the component.

ref.description: The name of the referenced glyph.

scale.description: The scale transform of the component.

slant.description: The slant transform of the component.

traverseAnchors.description: Whether the component should traverse anchors.

disabled.description: Whether the custom parameter is disabled.

name.description: The name of the custom parameter.

value.description: The value of the custom parameter.

automatic.description: Whether the code of the feature prefix is generated automatically.

disabled.description: Whether the feature prefix is disabled.

file.description: The file name of the file containing the code of the feature prefix. The file is located in `DocumentName.glyphspackage/features/FILENAME` where `FILENAME` is this value. The file contents are equivalent to the string defined by the `code` property.

name.description: The name of the feature prefix.

notes.description: A string serving as a description or comment about the feature prefix.

automatic.description: Whether the code of the feature is generated automatically.

file.description: The file name of the file containing the code of the feature. The file is located in `DocumentName.glyphspackage/features/FILENAME` where `FILENAME` is this value. The file contents are equivalent to the string defined by the `code` property.

notes.description: A string serving as a description or comment about the feature.

tag.description: The four-letter tag of the feature.

axesValues.description: The designspace location of the master.

customParameters.description: The custom parameters of the master.

guides.description: The global guides of the master.

iconName.description: The name of the icon that represents the master. Generally omitted when equal to `Regular`, or equal to the default icon name of the master (`GSFontMaster.defaultIconName`). For a list of available names, consult `GSFontMaster.iconNames()`.

id.description: The unique identifier of the master.

metricValues.description: The metric values of the master.

name.description: The name of the master. May be omitted in file format version 1 when equal to `Regular` or the default master name.

numberValues.description: The number values of the master.

stemValues.description: The stem values of the master.

tempData.description: Auto-save files only: Temporary data associated with the master.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the master.

visible.description: Whether the master is visible in the preview.

axes.description: The Smart Glyph variation axes of the glyph.

case.description: The case of the glyph. If unset, then the case is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

category.description: The category of the glyph. If unset, then the category is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

color.description: The color label of the glyph.

direction.description: The writing direction of the glyph. If unset, then the writing direction is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

groupIdx.description: The index of the glyph within its group.

kernBottom.description: The kerning group of the bottom side of the glyph.

kernLeft.description: The kerning group of the left side of the glyph.

kernRight.description: The kerning group of the right side of the glyph.

kernTop.description: The kerning group of the top side of the glyph.

lastChange.description: The date and time of the last change of the glyph.

metricBottom.description: The bottom metrics key of the glyph.

metricLeft.description: The left metrics key of the glyph.

metricRight.description: The right metrics key of the glyph.

metricTop.description: The top metrics key of the glyph.

metricVertOrigin.description: The vertical origin metrics key of the glyph.

metricVertWidth.description: The vertical width metrics key of the glyph.

metricWidth.description: The width metrics key of the glyph.

note.description: A string serving as a description or comment about the glyph.

partsSettings.description: A list of the Smart Glyph properties and their top/bottom values.

production.description: The production name of the glyph. If unset, then the production name is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name or the Unicode code point.

script.description: The script of the glyph. If unset, then the script is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

sortName.description: The sort name of the glyph. If unset, then the sort name is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

sortNameKeep.description: The sort name of the glyph used in the *Keep Alternates Next to Base Glyph* display mode. If unset, then the sort name is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

subCategory.description: The subcategory of the glyph. If unset, then the subcategory is based on a glyph data lookup based on the glyph name.

tags.description: The tags of the glyph, sorted lexicographically.

oneOf.description: The code point value.
An ascending list of code point values.

unicode.description: The Unicode code points of the glyph.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the glyph.

angle.description: The angle at which the guide is drawn in degrees clockwise.

filter.description: The filter of the guide. The syntax is the description of [NSPredicate](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/nspredicate). Omitted when no filter is defined.

length.description: The length of a line-type guide.

lockAngle.description: Whether the angle of the guide is locked.

showMeasurement.description: Whether the measurement of the guide is shown.

slope.description: Whether the guide has a slope.

colors.description: The color stops of the gradient.

end.description: The end point of the linear gradient relative to the shape bounds.

extend.description: How the gradient behaves outside the start/end range. Omitted for pad mode.

start.description: The start point of the linear gradient relative to the shape bounds.

oneOf.description: A linear gradient.

colors.description: The color stops of the gradient.

end.description: The end center of the radial gradient relative to the shape bounds.

endRadius.description: The end radius of the radial gradient relative to the shape bounds.

extend.description: How the gradient behaves outside the start/end range. Omitted for pad mode.

start.description: The start center of the radial gradient relative to the shape bounds.

startRadius.description: The start radius of the radial gradient relative to the shape bounds.

oneOf.description: A radial gradient.

angle.description: The angular extent of the conic gradient.

center.description: The center of the conic gradient relative to the shape bounds.

colors.description: The color stops of the gradient.

controlRadius.description: The radius used to control the conic gradient.

extend.description: How the gradient behaves outside the start/end range. Omitted for pad mode.

startAngle.description: The start angle of the conic gradient.

oneOf.description: A conic gradient.

horizontal.description: Whether the hint is horizontal. Not written for path components.

other1.description: The first other point of the hint, used by TrueType instructions that need more than two nodes.

other2.description: The second other point of the hint, used by TrueType instructions that need more than three nodes.

prefixItems.description: The width of the hint. `21` for bottom ghost hints and flex hints, `-20` for top ghost hints.

alpha.description: The alpha value of the image.

angle.description: The rotation angle of the image in degrees clockwise.

prefixItems.description: The X coordinate of the crop origin.
The Y coordinate of the crop origin.
The width of the crop size.
The height of the crop size.

crop.description: The cropped frame of the image, specified as the crop origin X/Y and size width/height.

imagePath.description: The file path of the image file relative to the document file.

imageURL.description: The URL bookmark data of the image file path.

scale.description: The scale factor of the image.

slant.description: The slant factor of the image.

axesValues.description: The internal axis locations of the instance. These values are also used for the external axis locations, if no external axis locations are specified separately.

customParameters.description: The custom parameters of the instance.

id.description: The unique ID of the instance.

oneOf.description: The X and Y factors are the same.
The X and Y factors.

instanceInterpolations.description: The interpolation factors where the keys are the master IDs.

linkStyle.description: The name of the style-linked instance.

manualInterpolation.description: Whether the `instanceInterpolations` values are used. Otherwise, the values are calculated from the axis values.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the instance.

visible.description: Whether the instance is visible when previewing all instances.

weightClass.description: The weight class of the instance.

widthClass.description: The width class of the instance.

prefixItems.description: The index of a path shape.
The index of a node on a path.

oneOf.description: The index path of a node on a path.

prefixItems.description: The index of a path shape.
The index of a node on a path.

oneOf.description: The index path of an inflection, where the first two path components point to an on-curve node that finishes a curve segment. The inflection component is most likely `0`.

prefixItems.description: The index of a path shape (P1).
The index of a node (N1) on P1.
The index of a path shape (P2).
The index of a node (N2) on P2.

oneOf.description: Points to the intersection of two path segments. The nodes are the ones finishing the segments.
An attachment to the left or right side-bearing.

additionalProperties.description: Maps glyph names or class names to kerning values.
Maps glyph names or class names to kerning partners.

kerning.description: Maps master IDs to kerning definitions.

additionalProperties.description: Maps master IDs to kerning values.

kerningContext.description: Maps kerning contexts to kerning definitions.

associatedMasterId.description: The unique identifier of the associated master. Omitted when equal to the layer ID.

anchors.description: The anchors of the background layer.

annotations.description: The annotations of the background layer.

backgroundImage.description: The background image of the layer.

guides.description: The guides of the background layer.

hints.description: The hints of the background layer.

shapes.description: The shapes of the background layer.

backgroundImage.description: The background image of the layer.

color.description: The color label of the layer.

layerId.description: The unique ID of the layer. Matches the master ID when the layer is a master layer.

metricBottom.description: The bottom metrics key of the layer.

metricLeft.description: The left metrics key of the layer.

metricRight.description: The right metrics key of the layer.

metricTop.description: The top metrics key of the layer.

metricVertOrigin.description: The vertical origin metrics key of the layer.

metricVertWidth.description: The vertical width metrics key of the layer.

metricWidth.description: The width metrics key of the layer.

name.description: The name of the layer. Master layers and other special layers display a name in the Glyphs UI that is derived from the layer’s role (for example, the name of the master that the layer belongs to). These derived names are not written to the file. Instead, this name is only displayed in the UI for non-special layers (like backup layers).

oneOf.description: Bottom: the layer corresponds to the bottom value of the property.
Top: the layer corresponds to the top value of the property.

partSelection.description: The Smart Glyph setting of the layer. The keys are the property names. The values are either `1` if the layer corresponds to the bottom value of the property or `2` if the layer corresponds to the top value of the property. If a layer is neither the top nor the bottom value, the property is omitted.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the layer.

vertOrigin.description: The vertical origin of the layer.

vertWidth.description: The vertical width of the layer.

axisRules.description: Alternative-layer rules, ordered like the font axes.

color.description: Whether the layer is an Apple color layer.

oneOf.description: The color palette index of a color palette layer.
The foreground text color (color index 65535).

colorPalette.description: The color palette index of a color palette layer.

oneOf.description: The explicit coordinate value.
Use the default value for this axis.

coordinates.description: Intermediate-layer coordinates, ordered like the relevant axes. Starting in version 4, also contains the glyph-local axis coordinates for layers of Smart Glyphs.

svg.description: Whether the layer is an SVG color layer.

oneOf.description: Butt: ends the stroke at the path endpoint.
Round: extends the stroke with a semicircular cap.
Square: extends the stroke with a square cap.
Round inset: ends the stroke with an inset semicircular cap.
Align to axis: aligns the cap to the nearest coordinate axis.
Align to x-axis: aligns the cap to the x-axis.
Align to y-axis: aligns the cap to the y-axis.

filter.description: The filter of the metric limiting the scope of the metric to a subset of glyphs.

horizontal.description: Whether the metric is a horizontal metric.

over.description: The overshoot of the metric value.

pos.description: The offset from the baseline of the metric value.

prefixItems.description: The configuration of the node expressed as a sequence of characters. Types: `m`: move, `l`: line, `c`: cubic curve, `q`: quadratic curve, `u`: quartic curve, `h`: Hobby curve, `r`: Raph New Spiral, `o`: off-curve. Connections (may follow on-curve types): `s`: smooth, `t`: tangent. Orientation (left is the default): `R`: right, `C`: center. Locking (not locked is the default): `X`: locked.
The x-coordinate of the intermediate point.
The y-coordinate of the intermediate point.

oneOf.description: HOI intermediate point.

prefixItems.description: The x-coordinate of the rotation center.
The y-coordinate of the rotation center.

oneOf.description: The rotation center is automatically determined based on the shared center of the lower HOI shape and upper HOI shape.

rd.description: The rotation direction: clockwise or counter-clockwise. When not set, the direction with the smallest angle is used.

oneOf.description: HOI rotation.

HOI Bézier interpolation. The time is the linear interpolation from the associated node to the other node. The amplitude is the offset orthogonal to the line connecting the associated node and the other node as a percentage of the length of that line.

hoi.description: Maps axis tags to higher-order interpolation descriptions. The info is stored in the lower node for the HOI span of that axis.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the node.

language.description: The language tag of the string value. The tag is based on the [OpenType Language System Tags](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/opentype/spec/languagetags) but omits trailing whitespace.

bottomValue.description: The lower end of the value range of the property.

topValue.description: The upper end of the value range of the property.

names.description: Maps color indices to color names.

backgroundStyle.description: Which UI background styles the palette is intended for.

palettes.description: The version 4 structure of the `Color Palettes` custom parameter.

nodes.description: The on- and off-curve nodes of the path.

color.description: The color label of the shape.

compositing.description: The compositing operation used to draw the shape. Omitted for the default source-over operation.

fill.description: Whether a stroked path is also filled.

fillColor.description: The fill color of the shape.

gradient.description: The fill gradient of the shape.

group.description: The ID of the parent shape group. Omitted for shapes in the root group.

lineCapEnd.description: The line cap style at the end of the stroke.

lineCapStart.description: The line cap style at the start of the stroke.

oneOf.description: Miter: extends the segment edges until they intersect.
Round: connects the segment edges with a circular arc.
Bevel: connects the segment edges with a straight edge.
Round full: connects the complete segment ends with a circular arc.

lineJoin.description: The line join style of the stroke.

oneOf.description: None: does not use the shape as a mask.
Subtract: removes the area covered by the shape.
Intersect: retains only the area covered by the shape.

mask.description: How the shape masks preceding shapes in the same composition unit.

reversePaths.description: Whether paths from the shape are reversed for drawing/export.

shadow.description: The outer shadow of the shape.

shadowIn.description: The inner shadow of the shape.

strokeColor.description: The stroke color of the shape.

strokeGradient.description: The stroke gradient of the shape.

strokeHeight.description: The vertical stroke size, or an expression resolving to one. Falls back to the value of `strokeWidth` when unset.

strokePos.description: The stroke position. In version 4, values range from inside (-1) through centered (0) to outside (1). In version 3, values range from outside (0) through centered (0.5) to inside (1).

strokeWidth.description: The horizontal stroke size, or an expression resolving to one.

attr.description: The attributes of the shape group.

groupId.description: The unique ID of the shape group. The empty string is reserved for the layer’s root group and is not written as a shape group.

blur.description: The shadow blur radius, stored as an expression string.

offsetX.description: The horizontal shadow offset, stored as an expression string.

offsetY.description: The vertical shadow offset, stored as an expression string.

.appVersion.description: The build number of Glyphs used to save the file.

oneOf.description: Glyphs file format version 4.
Glyphs file format version 3.

.formatVersion.description: The version of the file format. If unset, the file is considered to be version 1 as used by Glyphs 1 and Glyphs 2.

DisplayStrings.description: The strings of the Edit View tabs. Omitted when the `Write DisplayStrings` custom parameter is set to false. Omitted and written as `displayStrings` to `UIState.plist` in case of a package file.

axes.description: The designspace variation axes of the font.

classes.description: The OpenType layout classes of the font.

customParameters.description: The custom parameters of the font.

date.description: The moment in time that is used as the creation date of exported font files including date, time, and timezone.

featurePrefixes.description: The OpenType layout feature prefixes of the font.

features.description: The OpenType layout features of the font.

dependencies.description: Maps dependency class names to dependency display names.

disablesAutomaticAlignment.description: Whether automatic alignment of components is disabled.

disablesNiceNames.description: Whether to use production names instead of nice names.

keepAlternatesTogether.description: Whether to keep alternates glyphs together in Font View.

keyboardIncrementBig.description: The keyboard increment when holding the Shift key.

keyboardIncrementHuge.description: The keyboard increment when holding both the Shift and Command key.

previewRemoveOverlap.description: Whether to preview the effect of the Remove Overlaps filter in Edit View.

snapToObjects.description: Whether snapping is enabled in Edit View.

unitsPerEm.description: The number of coordinate units on the em square.

userData.description: Custom data associated with the font.

versionMajor.description: The major version number of the font.

versionMinor.description: The minor version number of the font.
